codeReview.summary: The commit collapses discovery to a single RadioSet, removes DataTable usage from the discovery step, resets discovery state on each re-entry, and introduces generation/worker guards so stale remote-check results are cancelled/ignored when navigating back or changing selection.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission validation contract still contains stale DataTable-based discovery assertions that no longer match the RadioSet-only architecture used by this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:311-317 still requires #key-table row counts for VAL-FLOW-009, while setup.py@ca1a1eb:301-319 composes discovery with only #key-select and no DataTable.

summary: Reviewed worker session 8b972bf9-04d3-4c63-ae7f-a43d1da5eb67 and commit ca1a1eb; feature passes with no blocking/non-blocking code defects found.
